config.friendcreeper.title: Friend Creeper Settings
config.friendcreeper.allowOwnerDamage.to: Whether the owner can damage their own tamed Creeper.
config.friendcreeper.followOwner.tooltip: Whether tamed Creepers follow their owner.
config.friendcreeper.revengeOwner.toolti: Whether tamed Creepers avenge their owner when attacked.
config.friendcreeper.snowGolemAttack.too: Whether Snow Golems can target tamed Creepers.
config.friendcreeper.hurtSound.tooltip: Whether tamed Creepers play a hurt sound when at low health.
config.friendcreeper.renderPoppy.tooltip: Whether to render the poppy on tamed Creepers' heads.
config.friendcreeper.afraidOfCats.toolti: Whether tamed Creepers are afraid of cats and ocelots.
config.friendcreeper.witherRoseOnLowHeal:
Whether tamed Creepers show a wither rose instead of a poppy when at low health.
Requires Render Poppy to be enabled.
screen.friendcreeper.noconfig.line1: Cloth Config API is not installed
screen.friendcreeper.noconfig.line2: Please install it before configuring via the graphical interface.
screen.friendcreeper.noconfig.line3: You can download it from Modrinth or CurseForge.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.friendcre: Tame Creepers with gunpowder and make them your friend.
